programmes.show_description: (2020) Oscar-winning drama with Anthony Hopkins and Olivia Colman. A man living with dementia struggles to piece reality together as he fights to keep his independence in his beloved home.
(2020) Blake Lively and Jude Law star in Reed Morano's thriller from the producers of 007. A woman seeks vengeance on the people who killed her family.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1943) Drama. Director Sam Wood's epic adaptation of Ernest Hemingway's classic story about the Spanish Civil War. Starring Oscar-nominees Gary Cooper and Ingrid Bergman.
Director Michael Pearce and star Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey.
(1949) Drama with John Ireland. A local politician begins to lust for the kind of power he used to hold to account. He should be careful how he treats people on the way to the top...
(1971) Vanessa Redgrave stars in a dramatisation of the life of the 16th-century Scottish queen. Glenda Jackson co-stars as her cousin and rival, England's Queen Elizabeth I.
(1989) Star-studded tragi-comedy with Julia Roberts, Daryl Hannah, Dolly Parton and more. Six Southern belles console and cajole each other through life in a Louisiana beauty parlour.
(2020) Action thriller starring Liam Neeson as a notorious bank robber. He wants to give it all up for love but is cheated by corrupt FBI agents. Can he clear his name and get the girl?
(1984) Oscar-winning real-life drama. American reporter Sydney Schanberg and his translator Dith Pran are separated during the Cambodian Civil War, putting Dith Pran in mortal danger.
(2021) Thriller. Nicolas Cage delivers a subtle turn in Michael Sarnoski's debut, an intriguing tale of an off-the-grid truffle hunter who returns to the city to rescue his kidnapped pig.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1941) American frontier pioneering western starring Randolph Scott, Robert Young and Dean Jagger as three very different men working to connect east and west by telegraph in the 1860s.
(1957) Comedy. Kenneth More stars as the perfect butler, who assumes command when he, his aristocratic employer (Cecil Parker) and his family and friends are shipwrecked on a desert island.
(1965) Thriller. Sidney Poitier plays a photojournalist aboard a destroyer whose commander's obsessive hunt for a Soviet sub could plunge the world into nuclear war.
(1954) Classic 'cowboys and Indians' Western. Gary Cooper, Richard Widmark and Cameron Mitchell star as three rascals hired by Susan Hayward to rescue her husband from Apache territory.
(2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.
(2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.
